name: Old Fashioned Chocolate Icing
recipeIngredient: 1 tbsp. Karo syrup or other syrup
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the chocolate, sugar, syrup, and milk in a bowl. Mix well.
2. Cook the mixture with a candy thermometer to 232 degrees Fahrenheit.
3. Add in the butter and vanilla.
4. Do not stir! Let it cool to 130 degrees Fahrenheit.
5. Beat well until ready to use.
This is the recipe used by the lady who made all the birthday cakes and special occasion cakes in our community for years. It's worth the effort.
